# misp_user (Data Source)

Look up a MISP user by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_user" "admin" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `autoalert` (Boolean)
- `certif_public` (String)
- `change_pw` (Boolean)
- `contactalert` (Boolean)
- `disabled` (Boolean)
- `email` (String)
- `expiration` (String)
- `gpgkey` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `org_id` (String)
- `role_id` (String)
- `termsaccepted` (Boolean)
